data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the fraud detection mechanism for self-referrals and fake accounts. While the linked use case mentions that the fraud system flags suspicious self-referral patterns and blocks them, it does not provide concrete evidence or details on how this detection is implemented or verified. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the specific mechanisms of fraud detection, which prevents a full validation of the requirement.
gaps: Lack of detailed evidence on the implementation and effectiveness of the fraud detection system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
